---
title: "RNN"
author: "Yun Tsing"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(lubridate)
library(keras3)
library(tensorflow)
library(reticulate)
library(rBayesianOptimization)
library(fastshap)
library(tidyverse)

df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
```


```{r}
predict_alpha_rnn <- function(df, target = "alpha_ann") {
  
  set.seed(4101)
  tensorflow::set_random_seed(4101, disable_gpu = FALSE)
  start_time = Sys.time()
  
  features <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann"))
  n_feats  <- length(features)
  pred_year <- max(year(df$caldt))
  
  train_full <- df[year(df$caldt) <  pred_year, ]
  test       <- df[year(df$caldt) == pred_year, ]
  
  n_years    <- sort(unique(year(train_full$caldt)))
  cutoff     <- n_years[floor(length(n_years) * 0.7)]
  tune_train <- train_full[year(train_full$caldt) <= cutoff, ]
  tune_val   <- train_full[year(train_full$caldt) >  cutoff, ]
  
  scaler   <- preProcess(as.matrix(tune_train[, features]), method = c("center", "scale"))
  prep_rnn <- function(data) {
    m <- predict(scaler, as.matrix(data[, features]))
    array(m, dim = c(nrow(m), 1, n_feats))
  }
  
  X_train <- prep_rnn(tune_train); y_train <- tune_train[[target]]
  X_val   <- prep_rnn(tune_val);   y_val   <- tune_val[[target]]

  build_custom_lstm <- function(p) {
    model <- keras_model_sequential()
    model |> layer_dropout(rate = p$dr_in, input_shape = c(1, n_feats))
    
    for (i in 1:p$n_layers) {
      model |> layer_lstm(
        units = as.integer(p$units),
        activation = p$activation,
        recurrent_activation = "sigmoid", 
        return_sequences = (i < p$n_layers),
        kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(l = p$wd)
      )
      
      if (p$use_bn && p$bn_pos == "before") model |> layer_batch_normalization()
      model |> layer_dropout(rate = p$dr_hid)
      if (p$use_bn && p$bn_pos == "after") model |> layer_batch_normalization()
    }
    
    model |> layer_dense(units = 1)
    model |> compile(optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = p$lr), loss = "mse")
    return(model)
  }

  # Bayesian optimisation
  lstm_bayes_func <- function(lr, n_layers, units, dr_in, dr_hid, batch_idx, bn_idx, bn_pos_idx, act_idx, wd, eps) {
    
    p <- list(
      lr = lr, n_layers = as.integer(n_layers), units = as.integer(units),
      dr_in = dr_in, dr_hid = dr_hid,
      batch_size = ifelse(batch_idx > 0.5, 64L, 32L),
      use_bn = ifelse(bn_idx > 0.5, TRUE, FALSE),
      bn_pos = ifelse(bn_pos_idx > 0.5, "after", "before"),
      activation = ifelse(act_idx > 0.5, "relu", "tanh"),
      wd = wd, epochs = as.integer(eps)
    )
    
    model <- build_custom_lstm(p)
    history <- model |> fit(
      X_train, y_train, epochs = p$epochs, batch_size = p$batch_size, 
      verbose = 0, validation_data = list(X_val, y_val),
      callbacks = list(callback_early_stopping(patience = 3))
    )
    
    val_mse <- min(history$metrics$val_loss)
    clear_session()
    return(list(Score = -val_mse, Pred = 0))
  }

  # Search for hyperparameters
  message(paste("Tuning all 11 parameters for year:", pred_year))
  search_res <- BayesianOptimization(
    FUN = lstm_bayes_func,
    bounds = list(
      lr = c(0.001, 0.01), n_layers = c(1L, 2L), units = c(32L, 128L),
      dr_in = c(0.0, 0.3), dr_hid = c(0.1, 0.5),
      batch_idx = c(0, 1), bn_idx = c(0, 1), bn_pos_idx = c(0, 1),
      act_idx = c(0, 0), wd = c(1e-5, 1e-3), eps = c(10L, 50L)
    ),
    init_points = 2, n_iter = 2, acq = "ei"
  )

  # Refit model with best parameters
  best_p <- search_res$Best_Par
  
  best_config <- list(
    lr = best_p["lr"],
    n_layers = as.integer(best_p["n_layers"]),
    units = as.integer(best_p["units"]),
    dr_in = best_p["dr_in"],
    dr_hid = best_p["dr_hid"],
    batch_size = ifelse(best_p["batch_idx"] > 0.5, 64L, 32L),
    use_bn = ifelse(best_p["bn_idx"] > 0.5, TRUE, FALSE),
    bn_pos = ifelse(best_p["bn_pos_idx"] > 0.5, "after", "before"),
    activation = ifelse(best_p["act_idx"] > 0.5, "tanh", "tanh"),
    wd = best_p["wd"],
    epochs = as.integer(best_p["eps"]) 
  )

  X_full <- prep_rnn(train_full); y_full <- train_full[[target]]
  final_model <- build_custom_lstm(best_config)
  
  # Final fit on 100% of data
  final_model |> fit(
    X_full, y_full, 
    epochs = best_config$epochs, 
    batch_size = best_config$batch_size, 
    verbose = 0
  )
  
  X_test <- prep_rnn(test)
  preds  <- final_model |> predict(X_test, verbose = 0)
  
  clear_session()
  end_time = Sys.time()
  duration = round(difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "mins"), 2)
  print(duration)
  
  cat(sprintf(
    "\n========================================================
[Hyperparameter summary] Year: %d
--------------------------------------------------------
Best MSE:             %.8f
--------------------------------------------------------
1.  Learning Rate:    %.5f
2.  Hidden Layers:    %d
3.  Units per Layer:  %d
4.  Dropout (Input):  %.2f
5.  Dropout (Hidden): %.2f
6.  Mini-Batch Size:  %d
7.  Batch Norm:       %s
8.  BN Position:      %s
9.  Activation:       %s
10. Weight Decay:     %.6f
11. Epochs:           %d
========================================================\n",
    pred_year,
    -search_res$Best_Value,         # MSE
    best_config$lr,                 # 1. Learning Rate
    best_config$n_layers,           # 2. Hidden Layers
    best_config$units,              # 3. Units
    best_config$dr_in,              # 4. Dropout Input
    best_config$dr_hid,             # 5. Dropout Hidden
    best_config$batch_size,         # 6. Mini-batch size
    as.character(best_config$use_bn),# 7. Use BN?
    best_config$bn_pos,             # 8. BN Position (Before/After)
    best_config$activation,         # 9. Activation
    best_config$wd,                 # 10. Weight Decay
    best_config$epochs              # 11. Number of Epochs
  ))
  
  return(data.frame(
    evaluation_year = pred_year,
    crsp_fundno = test$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha = as.numeric(preds)
  ))
}

```



## Feature analysis

```{r}

build_custom_lstm <- function(p) {
    model <- keras_model_sequential()
    
    model |> layer_dropout(rate = p$dr_in, input_shape = c(1, n_feats))
    
    for (i in 1:p$n_layers) {
      model |> layer_lstm(
        units = as.integer(p$units),
        activation = p$activation,
        recurrent_activation = "sigmoid", 
        return_sequences = (i < p$n_layers),
        kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(l = p$wd)
      )
      
      if (p$use_bn && p$bn_pos == "before") model |> layer_batch_normalization()
      model |> layer_dropout(rate = p$dr_hid)
      if (p$use_bn && p$bn_pos == "after") model |> layer_batch_normalization()
    }
    
    model |> layer_dense(units = 1)
    
    model |> compile(
      optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = p$lr, clipnorm = 1.0), 
      loss = "mse"
    )
    return(model)
  }


feature_names <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann", "year"))
n_feats <- length(feature_names)


best_config <- list(
  lr          = 0.00523,      # 1. Learning Rate
  n_layers    = 1L,           # 2. Hidden Layers (L for integer)
  units       = 89L,         # 3. Units per Layer
  dr_in       = 0.27,         # 4. Dropout (Input)
  dr_hid      = 0.24,         # 5. Dropout (Hidden)
  batch_size  = 32L,          # 6. Mini-Batch Size
  use_bn      = FALSE,        # 7. Batch Norm
  bn_pos      = "after",     # 8. BN Position
  activation  = "tanh",       # 9. Activation
  wd          = 0.000413,     # 10. Weight Decay
  epochs      = 30L           # 11. Epochs
)


# Train on latest window
train_final <- df %>% filter(year(caldt) <= 2024)
X_final_raw <- as.matrix(train_final[, feature_names])
y_final     <- train_final$alpha_ann

# Re-scale based on the final training set
scaler_final   <- preProcess(X_final_raw, method = c("center", "scale"))
X_final_scaled <- predict(scaler_final, X_final_raw)

X_final_3d <- array(X_final_scaled, dim = c(nrow(X_final_scaled), 1, length(feature_names)))

# Fit model

final_rnn_model <- build_custom_lstm(best_config) 
final_rnn_model %>% fit(
  X_final_3d, y_final,
  epochs = best_config$epochs,
  batch_size = best_config$batch_size,
  verbose = 1
)

set.seed(4101)
sample_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X_final_scaled)), size = 1500)
X_sample <- as.data.frame(X_final_scaled[sample_idx, ])

rnn_shap_wrapper <- function(object, newdata) {
  arr <- array(as.matrix(newdata), dim = c(nrow(newdata), 1, ncol(newdata)))
  as.vector(predict(object, arr, verbose = 0))
}

shap_values_rnn <- explain(
  final_rnn_model,
  X = X_sample,
  pred_wrapper = rnn_shap_wrapper,
  nsim = 20,
  adjust = TRUE
)

imp_df_rnn <- tibble(
  feature = colnames(shap_values_rnn),
  value = colMeans(abs(shap_values_rnn))
) %>% arrange(desc(value))

rnn_shap_ranking_plot <- ggplot(imp_df_rnn, 
       aes(y = reorder(feature, value), x = value, fill = value)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 5)), nudge_x = max(imp_df_rnn$value)*0.05) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "firebrick", high = "dodgerblue4") +
  labs(title = "RNN LSTM SHAP Ranking (Best Window Params)",
       subtitle = "Calculated on 1,500 training samples",
       y = "", x = "Mean (|SHAP|)") +
  theme_minimal()

print(rnn_shap_ranking_plot)
ggsave("../figures/rnn_shap_ranking_bar.png", width = 10, height = 8)
```
